name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Vote Just Happened
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vote_just_happened&n=1)
---
Peter \-- **As the vote to End Walz' Emergency Powers was going down at the Capitol and vulnerable Democrats like Julie Sandstede and Dave Lislegard were in the crosshairs, we learned from the Governors office that a "significant dialback of COVID restrictions" are[going to be announced tomorrow](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=njZW7APv9ZjWe_0fvGjiu0b9g1bNSzOlA43jN1tY0pI216-SthwvBseCy8u8ogftMURopEngX8XfjtKa40JBnijSLgmGUt0DAU3kgzc6PZH2elFjhY2SjMzn39bIzzBheePwprDuy7h7G6ge92Q-tQ&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vote_just_happened&n=2). ** It's quite clear to me that the pressure from you, and the hundreds of thousands of people who have joined this effort to End Walz' Emergency Powers, is working. Unfortunately, Walz once again wants to play politics over doing what's right. His announcement was made to release tension on his Party's most vulnerable members and provide them political cover. So Sandstede and gang voted again to protect Walz' Emergency Powers this evening. [Here's the vote](https://www.action4liberty.com/democrats_vote_to_protect_walz_emergency_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vote_just_happened&n=3). Now I don't know if Governor Walz and his team think that we'll just accept his dialback tomorrow and remove the pressure off of Sandstede, Lislegard, Sundin and the rest. If so, he couldn't possibly be MORE WRONG! This just shows we are making progress. Our pressure works. We already knew that because I got a call today from the House Sergeant of Arms who said members of the Minnesota House requested us to take down our FB Ads against Sandstede and Lislegard. **I respectfully declined, of course! This is all it said:** We're dead serious about this issue. We can't allow one person to create unilateral orders in this state that infringe on our liberties any longer. We will not quit until Walz' powers are gone and we ensure this NEVER HAPPENS AGAIN! I told the individual from the Sergeant of Arms office that we don't have any sympathy for the enablers of Walz' Emergency Powers that have led to our businesses being shut down, harassed by government, and even sued by the Attorney General on behalf of the Walz Administration. **As long as Governor Walz' powers still exist, our rights can still be trampled on and business owners will still live in fear of future shutdowns.** So if these Con Artist politicians think that the fight is over, they are wrong. Meanwhile our team is knocking on thousands of doors every week. The leader of my team just asked for 3,000 new pieces of Sandstede literature this morning for the upcoming week. [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vote_just_happened&n=4) I want to thank all of you who took the time to email or call the legislators from our recent email. Reports we got back suggested that their inboxes were overfilled with your messages and voicemail boxes got overwhelmed. The fact that thousands of people contacted them signals they have a real problem on their hands. They know you are willing to donate to our efforts to hold them accountable! **Please do me a favor. A box of lit costs $150.[Please help us pay for more literature so we can hand them to thousands of their voters. Deliver a new box of lit to our team with a donation of $150. If that's too much, help us buy a partial box with a donation of $100 or $50. Let's continue forcing this issue by taking the message DIRECTLY TO THEIR VOTERS!](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vote_just_happened&n=5)** **In Liberty,

** **Jake Duesenberg** **President, Action 4 Liberty** **P.S. In case you missed it, a bunch of patriots on the Ramsey City Council passed a Resolution on Tuesday that nullifies the Governor's Mask Mandate and Executive Orders in their city using the language of our Liberate Our City Resolution.[Here's the story](https://www.action4liberty.com/ramsey_council_nullifies_walz_mask_mandate_in_city?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vote_just_happened&n=6). ** Action 4 Liberty 1920 Oakcrest Ave #5 Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vote_just_happened&n=7).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vote_just_happened&n=8).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vote_just_happened&n=9), software for leaders.

name: ALERT via Scott Fitzgerald
subject: 🚨 Biden's COVID Progressive Payoff
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
body:
Are YOU better off than a year ago? Peter,The majority Democrats just passed, under the cover of COVID, a $1.9 trillion **progressive payoff **bill that includes just 9% spending on public health.Here's what's in it that they're NOT telling you about...
* **Stimulus checks for prison inmates**
* Putting **teachers unions** ahead of students by delaying school re-openings
* Giving **bureaucrats** a $21,000 bonus if their child's classes are online
* **Pork projects** like a $100 million Silicon Valley subway, a $1.5 million bridge to Canada, and "environmental justice grants"
* **Blue-state bailouts **that send money from fiscally responsible states like Wisconsin to fix broken budgets in states like Illinois.

Not only are they spending money we don't have, putting the burden on future generations ($17,000 for every man, woman, and child in America), but they're forcing states like Wisconsin to **subsidize the mistakes of poorly run states like Illinois! **I'm proud to [fight back](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-mtlzkt-ahkdjtlkr-r/) against this kind of liberal WASTE in Congress. [[ JOIN FITZGERALD ] - OPPOSE The Liberal Spending Spree!](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-mtlzkt-ahkdjtlkr-y/) Joe Biden is set to give a speech about where we are today compared to a year ago. A year ago, our country was facing unknown challenges. Today, we're facing some very familiar ones: **runaway** **pork** , **bailouts** , and **liberals who want to spend our country into socialism!**Please, take a moment to [click here and SUPPORT my work on behalf of the taxpayers!](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-mtlzkt-ahkdjtlkr-j/)-Congressman Scott Fitzgerald [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-mtlzkt-ahkdjtlkr-t/)[](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-mtlzkt-ahkdjtlkr-i/) Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
P.O. Box 5048, Elm Grove, WI 53122 [Preferences](https://scottfitzgerald.updatemyprofile.com/t-mtlzkt-62D8F9CE-ahkdjtlkr-d) | [Unsubscribe](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-u-mtlzkt-ahkdjtlkr-h/)

name: Team Northam
subject: FW: I need your help to protect our Democratic Majority
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Way Ahead PO Box 597
body:
Friend,
We wanted to make sure you saw Governor Northam's important message about what's at stake this November.
[**Please chip in to our efforts to protect our Blue Majority today!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/au6XWukAjdF5myUmti9TekT8V0S_g42R-XlbfpU6Vk0=/8_UuMwQMatMIqZAhZnuWiRtYC494fHNPQ0Kf-Ok4-Lc=)
\- Team Northam

_Begin forwarded message:_
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/au6XWukAjdF5myUmti9TekT8V0S_g42R-XlbfpU6Vk0=/FRdxCeun0pRucIHDeTgrzrvwOmo5ycBdRV_fzNq-8-Y=)
---
Friend, Now that the legislative session is behind us, we are full steam ahead to November when all 100 seats in the House of Delegates are on the ballot. Thanks to your efforts in 2017 and 2019, Democrats hold the majority by the slimmest of margins. _**We _must_ protect our Majority and secure our Democratic future in Virginia.**_ **[](https://act.myngp.com/el/au6XWukAjdF5myUmti9TekT8V0S_g42R-XlbfpU6Vk0=/8_UuMwQMatMIqZAhZnuWiRtYC494fHNPQ0Kf-Ok4-Lc=)****[Please contribute to The Way Ahead 's Virginia Future Fund today so we can kickstart our effort to protect our Blue Majority!](https://act.myngp.com/el/au6XWukAjdF5myUmti9TekT8V0S_g42R-XlbfpU6Vk0=/8_UuMwQMatMIqZAhZnuWiRtYC494fHNPQ0Kf-Ok4-Lc=)** Under Democratic leadership in Virginia, we have passed historic gun safety legislation, repealed medically-unnecessary restrictions on women's healthcare, repealed racially discriminatory language in the Virginia Code, made Election Day a state holiday, and made Virginia the first Southern state to provide sweeping anti-discrimination protections for LGBTQ people. We are proud to be the third state in the nation to pass a ban on "no knock" warrants, and we have made monumental progress on criminal justice reform by becoming the first state in the South to abolish the death penalty. [**All of the progress we 've made is at stake if we don't protect our Blue Majority in November - I hope you can chip in to support our efforts today!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/au6XWukAjdF5myUmti9TekT8V0S_g42R-XlbfpU6Vk0=/8_UuMwQMatMIqZAhZnuWiRtYC494fHNPQ0Kf-Ok4-Lc=) Thanks for all you do. \- Ralph Northam

| Paid for by The Way Ahead PO Box 597
Richmond VA 23218 [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/au6XWukAjdF5myUmti9TekT8V0S_g42R-XlbfpU6Vk0=/TvIt8u5wdVqaXgobK13WeMdzMGjS97wstCoBTWGqUD0=) |

Do you want to retire Nancy Pelosi as Speaker?

**Friend, we can make it happen, but it 's going to take every grassroots conservative to join us.**

As we speak, the Democrats are organizing to buy Rep. Michelle Steel's district out from under her. Last year their dark money machine outspent her by a margin of 3 to 1. And they've made it clear they are willing to spend even more next time around. In fact, Nancy Pelosi's hand-picked candidate has already vowed for a rematch.

That's why it's so important to keep up with the Democrats spending, retake the House Majority for Republicans, and retire Nancy Pelosi once and for all. clean_body: Do you want to retire Nancy Pelosi? ** . == Do you want to retire Nancy Pelosi as Speaker? Friend, we can make it happen, but it 's going to take every grassroots conservative to join us. As we speak, the Democrats are organizing to buy Rep. Michelle Steel's district out from under her. Last year their dark money machine outspent her by a margin of 3 to 1. And they've made it clear they are willing to spend even more next time around. In fact, Nancy Pelosi's hand-picked candidate has already vowed for a rematch. That's why it's so important to keep up with the Democrats spending, retake the House Majority for Republicans, and retire Nancy Pelosi once and for all. == | == == ==** With a razor-thin margin in the House - the thinnest it's been in years - Republicans have so much momentum to retake the majority. But we need patriots like you to get us across the finish line. == \-- California Republican News Alerts With so much uncertainty right now, we know not everyone will be able to contribute. Dems are turning to Gavin Newsom...really?
| | | | |

Friend,

Right now, California is a disaster because of liberal Governor Gavin Newsom. Californians are trapped in their homes, unable to work, _AND_ they're paying the highest taxes in America.

This is bigger than just one state, it's about all of us. Gavin Newsom has wrecked the state - California's debt has skyrocketed, and while Newsom enjoys his $350 lunches (maskless and indoors) taxpayers are locked down and stuck with the bill. If Gavin Newsom gets away with this, it will send a message to other extreme Democrats that they can too.

**We 've got to put liberal governors on notice that they will be held accountable for their devastating, hypocritical policies that are destroying lives. [That's why Gavin Newsom has got to go.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_aIX_3M5kjKD6R4RUy9w0iEckoq-CAD4laTfuQCvArQit_FhZE98rBRyihYrncLsZj0We2MeKHOyCtrRyzJmY6ZysPNui8xE4d-inbBrpGBCKWDnRaDuysRwDkFJ5n6ZbSawYKtvL04TXFdGWJqZlVcZH20-ql284xPWsgqZxUDNy8dNMbrV-VsW2Nr9jzec1opRTPJZgX8pt3Kw5a0CwQPdyMnmHmbarSV5stcQIoODIgSLiZCsAf8jBsS4QW6mkaoxZVPGAW4NDkKArrIvrP27vjWTFei9I4tniKVnlbXuhH_4SyQfydOs4mabUT5gsXhHkRZCQxXKAFhLAcP2KTPjLdzYk3A3QhxLhqzLca7FciaDCymd_NQG6XYOFJ2cWKCGowM0GdrbDt_2KbUT-GdeyxOEb5tEDfxycopRybUDJQJ6BzqM0R3ZEj4IxL1EKTC9wAI-M3sTIf-u9xd72ZTTA8nInxoStlInIock1O8LBi0sX47Z5alqf8fIgytQrKeKGrK7qxM=&c=EZZAX8a7LNaLY5arEDIg7DoKPhDADZbX9D4SKd1E_zYwEJA2gIzEJg==&ch=nwuLx2s3pviW9TSqVZ6J31gykgCuOF10-4PspgNfnbz7ZhhViI0alA==)******

Despite the fact that nearly two million signatures have already been collected to recall Gov. Newsom, radical Democrats and the liberal media are already denouncing the effort as undemocratic and illegitimate. The Left will say and do anything to stop us from removing their poster boy for extremism.

We can't let radical Democrats silence our grassroots effort to take back California from one of the most damaging liberals in the country! [**Pitch in $25 or more today to help recall Gavin Newsom!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_aIX_3M5kjKD6R4RUy9w0iEckoq-CAD4laTfuQCvArQit_FhZE98rBRyihYrncLsZj0We2MeKHOyCtrRyzJmY6ZysPNui8xE4d-inbBrpGBCKWDnRaDuysRwDkFJ5n6ZbSawYKtvL04TXFdGWJqZlVcZH20-ql284xPWsgqZxUDNy8dNMbrV-VsW2Nr9jzec1opRTPJZgX8pt3Kw5a0CwQPdyMnmHmbarSV5stcQIoODIgSLiZCsAf8jBsS4QW6mkaoxZVPGAW4NDkKArrIvrP27vjWTFei9I4tniKVnlbXuhH_4SyQfydOs4mabUT5gsXhHkRZCQxXKAFhLAcP2KTPjLdzYk3A3QhxLhqzLca7FciaDCymd_NQG6XYOFJ2cWKCGowM0GdrbDt_2KbUT-GdeyxOEb5tEDfxycopRybUDJQJ6BzqM0R3ZEj4IxL1EKTC9wAI-M3sTIf-u9xd72ZTTA8nInxoStlInIock1O8LBi0sX47Z5alqf8fIgytQrKeKGrK7qxM=&c=EZZAX8a7LNaLY5arEDIg7DoKPhDADZbX9D4SKd1E_zYwEJA2gIzEJg==&ch=nwuLx2s3pviW9TSqVZ6J31gykgCuOF10-4PspgNfnbz7ZhhViI0alA==)

Simply put, we need to [**get rid of Gavin**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_aIX_3M5kjKD6R4RUy9w0iEckoq-CAD4laTfuQCvArQit_FhZE98rBRyihYrncLsZj0We2MeKHOyCtrRyzJmY6ZysPNui8xE4d-inbBrpGBCKWDnRaDuysRwDkFJ5n6ZbSawYKtvL04TXFdGWJqZlVcZH20-ql284xPWsgqZxUDNy8dNMbrV-VsW2Nr9jzec1opRTPJZgX8pt3Kw5a0CwQPdyMnmHmbarSV5stcQIoODIgSLiZCsAf8jBsS4QW6mkaoxZVPGAW4NDkKArrIvrP27vjWTFei9I4tniKVnlbXuhH_4SyQfydOs4mabUT5gsXhHkRZCQxXKAFhLAcP2KTPjLdzYk3A3QhxLhqzLca7FciaDCymd_NQG6XYOFJ2cWKCGowM0GdrbDt_2KbUT-GdeyxOEb5tEDfxycopRybUDJQJ6BzqM0R3ZEj4IxL1EKTC9wAI-M3sTIf-u9xd72ZTTA8nInxoStlInIock1O8LBi0sX47Z5alqf8fIgytQrKeKGrK7qxM=&c=EZZAX8a7LNaLY5arEDIg7DoKPhDADZbX9D4SKd1E_zYwEJA2gIzEJg==&ch=nwuLx2s3pviW9TSqVZ6J31gykgCuOF10-4PspgNfnbz7ZhhViI0alA==) before more Democrats follow his lead and level their own states.

name: Team Stanton
subject: It's crucial we protect renters right now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
Greg recently introduced Bill H.R. 1594 or the COVID-19 Eviction Consumer Report Fairness Act, which would protect renters and prohibit credit agencies from including information related to evictions during the pandemic. There are at least 200,000 Arizona households and millions across the country who are facing potential evictions. Arizonans who work hard, but have lost their job or fallen on hard times because of the economic effects stemming from this awful virus shouldn't suffer. It's time to come together to pass common sense legislation to help renters.

**[Greg is working hard in Congress to protect Arizonans. Let's show him our support as he works to deliver results for all Americans!](https://act.myngp.com/el/XulJF9hKjfTAUNgAiNBnwqUEaKhxIBaf9jJD8mknc-k=/wZg2Ku-KRBJ9a5VlEOmTvbycwQLGliAWF3xkL-Yi49U=?refcode=X_031221_StantonRentalProtections_A)**

[**Let 's make sure that we continue to support lawmakers like Greg who put people first, and govern with common sense.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/XulJF9hKjfTAUNgAiNBnwqUEaKhxIBaf9jJD8mknc-k=/40kSNA214fbKHPCFUcOzAoA7Rdx_YfX0dbCgwhCKiws=?refcode=X_031221_StantonRentalProtections_A)

body:

On the one year anniversary of the COVID shutdown, _Joe Biden decided to take a victory lap for his so-called "COVID" relief, and take credit for Operation Warp Speed. _

This time he took credit for the work of former President Trump and the many dedicated members of his administration that worked _**HARD** _to deliver a vaccine in _**RECORD** _time _.**Are you surprised, Friend? **_ [**FIGHT BACK AGAINST LYING BIDEN**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001C5Gl6hlO0u_yid1pTJ7lS9SgLOaetimQihGJjU0JpzV6q7-uJ4LAAtL6bsXV3SnK0hLZljVRwP7cWXLe8sCYofb2_U4wbjkr7BA_usbDhy1wAdAhF3LHheHvEj6seuroVEYEjRX1gVPVejAwpE3E6wE-41iEqp0ocjOX-2WwrUmHBVx_HikTD892sIfOGmmCXMegsV3xQwxEcKew5-OONbAInDmlcfD7om3fSHATmnP_OH7Je9PBAWiExD-eEjneKKWcBkYqsGecx7UKxtq8dLEb1haa5-Som7gWfKRXykyJoYWSfn1KxS_wYE1w88wlySAQFQ9wgG3cH8aYEPxXU-FNcvI_D4YQwBIkkiHHucY_00hvViMeanoORpy9oZPiw34Ugx0nZ5NLxk48P5C5I8443wHxZCIj7-bMW26_z0Imtl_JGtDpM7m7CMR7MqsnpwpXmPPFVFAIjUmYYJaJpA==&c=MiS71IyrR2IR7N4EKg8Jp44JZJmyz4iNHDY7ocU8YDUO5JDU3zSJdw==&ch=6LVfe65u14va3GojOernE3pmiiPuWNLkB_MSzZa8dcCF9XsFCN-jTA==) Just last week their so-called COVID "relief" bill gave billions of dollars to Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer's allies. **_Less than 10% of the bill is geared towards relief for Americans that need it most.[ What a sham.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001C5Gl6hlO0u_yid1pTJ7lS9SgLOaetimQihGJjU0JpzV6q7-uJ4LAAtL6bsXV3SnK0hLZljVRwP7cWXLe8sCYofb2_U4wbjkr7BA_usbDhy1wAdAhF3LHheHvEj6seuroVEYEjRX1gVPVejAwpE3E6wE-41iEqp0ocjOX-2WwrUmHBVx_HikTD892sIfOGmmCXMegsV3xQwxEcKew5-OONbAInDmlcfD7om3fSHATmnP_OH7Je9PBAWiExD-eEjneKKWcBkYqsGecx7UKxtq8dLEb1haa5-Som7gWfKRXykyJoYWSfn1KxS_wYE1w88wlySAQFQ9wgG3cH8aYEPxXU-FNcvI_D4YQwBIkkiHHucY_00hvViMeanoORpy9oZPiw34Ugx0nZ5NLxk48P5C5I8443wHxZCIj7-bMW26_z0Imtl_JGtDpM7m7CMR7MqsnpwpXmPPFVFAIjUmYYJaJpA==&c=MiS71IyrR2IR7N4EKg8Jp44JZJmyz4iNHDY7ocU8YDUO5JDU3zSJdw==&ch=6LVfe65u14va3GojOernE3pmiiPuWNLkB_MSzZa8dcCF9XsFCN-jTA==)_**

clean_body: By taking credit for Operation Warp Speed... == Friend, On the one year anniversary of the COVID shutdown, Joe Biden decided to take a victory lap for his so-called "COVID" relief, and take credit for Operation Warp Speed. This time he took credit for the work of former President Trump and the many dedicated members of his administration that worked HARD to deliver a vaccine in RECORD time .Are you surprised, Friend? == Just last week their so-called COVID "relief" bill gave billions of dollars to Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer's allies. Less than 10% of the bill is geared towards relief for Americans that need it most.== Our schools are shut, small businesses unsupported, and Americans are struggling to make ends meet, but don't worry Friend, Biden and Pelosi's corrupt allies are well taken care of. Friend, I'm sick and tired of this administration, and the radical Democrats, taking a victory lap for work they didn't even do. We need to put an end to their nonsense. == == This makes one thing clear, Friend: We cannot allow radial Democratic control of Washington to continue. The radical liberals in Washington will lie, spin and manipulate the facts to suit their agenda. They are entirely out of their depth -- and they know that the American people are onto them. HELP DEFEAT THE LYING LEFT | | == | | == | == | | == | == | | == This administration has been in office for less than 100 days, and it is beyond clear they need to be put in check by strong conservatives in the House and Senate. We cannot trust President Biden to stand up for the American people -- we need to stop him right here right now. == Thank you for your support, Rep. name: Kevin Faulconer
subject: Are California parents “racist”??
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Faulconer for Governor 2022
body:
COVID-19 cases in California have been plummeting, and parents are eager to get their kids back into the classroom.
Peter, COVID-19 cases in California have been plummeting, and parents are eager to get their kids back into the classroom. School officials like Los Angeles Unified School District Superintendent Austin Beutner have been working hard for a safe return, too. He recently secured 25,000 vaccine doses to cover every teacher and staff member in the district who work with children in sixth grade and below. **Yet, Gavin Newsom and his teachers union allies are doing everything in their power to stop kids from returning to classrooms — including accusing parents of racism!** _UTLA president Cecily Myart-Cruz called the tentative plan to partially reopen California schools “a recipe for propagating structural racism.”_ Myart-Cruz is pushing a narrative of racism, but in reality, the majority of parents want their kids back in school. Parents are even organizing in South Los Angeles to protest their kids’ schools being shut down, and push to reopen them. [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/afdb17ffcd9c1326/f7f06ea368a95f3ac3d6b838967d376c/34943) Children have a right to an education in America, but our “leaders” like Gavin Newsom and the teachers unions are denying it. Our kids, their families, and entire communities are suffering due to the school shutdowns, which no longer make any sense. _That’s why I’m running for governor of California._ I will fight the teachers unions head on and do what is right for our children — ALL of our children. Getting kids back into school isn’t racist, it’s common sense. Our families deserve better than the political games being played by the unions and Gavin Newsom. **If you believe our children deserve better, chip in what you can right now to help me fight for them.** [**CHIP IN TO GET KIDS BACK IN SCHOOL >**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/afdb17ffcd9c1326/7d55e517098e4365c3d6b838967d376c/34943) We have to start making our kids a priority again. We need to put them first, and stop allowing politics to excuse the unions and their refusal to get back into the classroom. Thanks for standing with me and our kids,
Kevin Faulconer [**CHIP IN $5 >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/afdb17ffcd9c1326/f70170042c145590c3d6b838967d376c/34943) [**CHIP IN $25 >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/afdb17ffcd9c1326/c87c56bf20cb58d9c3d6b838967d376c/34943) [**CHIP IN $50 >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/afdb17ffcd9c1326/51114dbb4f9bf8a1c3d6b838967d376c/34943) [**CHIP IN $100 >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/afdb17ffcd9c1326/5da0e0682577edcfc3d6b838967d376c/34943) | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/afdb17ffcd9c1326/1b94cdc2e5c46bf2c3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/afdb17ffcd9c1326/6fc06c2730bc3072c3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/afdb17ffcd9c1326/0c7a81281a3048aac3d6b838967d376c/34943)

body:
The 2021 election cycle is going to be critical for the future of Virginia, and any support you can give me would be so appreciated.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/26164368/276091110/-1287071472?refcode=210312_onboard&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mjc4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjk2ZTQ3ZC02NjgzLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7LQMYwnJmT02eXO9e8a-6e3_y3wloM_YR4nA9vK80xk=) Derek, Delegate Ibraheem Samirah here from the 86th District and I wanted to reach out to you today because we’re in a critical re-election fight and I wanted to ask for your support. **We’ve made so much progress on working to build a more equitable Virginia, but the work isn’t over. From creating a pathway to a medicare priced public option, to housing for all, fighting the climate crisis, and having a healthy democracy at our core, I’m working tirelessly to build healthier, happier, and more equitable communities -- making Virginia a better place for us all. ** If you want to learn more about the work I’m doing in Richmond, and a bit about my backstory -- I encourage you to check out my website by [clicking here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/26164369/276091111/271315809?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mjc4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjk2ZTQ3ZC02NjgzLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7LQMYwnJmT02eXO9e8a-6e3_y3wloM_YR4nA9vK80xk=&emci=16be4586-6083-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=f296e47d-6683-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&ceid=14089178) Now, with the 2021 elections coming up quickly (our primary is June 8th!) name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Reorganization Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
Last weekend kicked off an important few weeks for our party..

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/indiana/the-resiliency-of-hoosiers-470302?e=1acd9bb3d6)
Reorganization Day

Last weekend kicked off an important few weeks for our party as county parties met throughout the state to elect their party leaders. Reorganization Day at the county level was a great success and I’m glad I was able to participate in my county’s, Madison, and drop in on the Marion County Reorganization Day. Congratulations to all our chairs, vice chairs, and other elected county leaders. The success of our party is built on active local parties with engaged grassroots supporters and I am looking forward to continuing to work with our county leaders to grow our party and extend our winning streak.

The national scene, by contrast, is less encouraging than what we’re seeing on the local and state level. You probably saw that Congress has passed a monstrosity of a COVID “relief” package. As you could imagine from a Biden-Pelosi-Schumer led Washington DC, this bill is short on COVID priorities and long on liberal special interest wish lists. Poorly managed blue states are getting bailed out. Pelosi’s San Francisco is getting $600 million of your taxes to erase a budget deficit. $800 million is going overseas. The list goes on and on. In fact, less than 10% of the $1.9 trillion is directly related to COVID and just 1% is for vaccines.

It just shows that Democrats can’t be trusted with power in Washington DC. While they fight to keep our schools closed and our borders open, they’re writing gigantic checks for their socialist supporters. Thankfully, we have the opportunity to win back both the House and Senate in 2022 and I’m confident that a unified Republican Party will do just that.

Thank you

Kyle

Photo: Chairman Hupfer speaks at Marion Country Reorganization Day
Governor Holcomb's Week That Was

Continued Investment in Indiana

Governor Holcomb joined executives from iA as they announced their plans to open the company’s global headquarters in central Indiana. The company is a provider of software-enabled pharmacy fulfillment solutions. iA’s new global HQ currently employs 20 Indianapolis-based employees and plans to create up to an additional 420 new, high-wage jobs in central Indiana.

"With a thriving tech ecosystem and history of life sciences excellence, Indiana is the perfect place for companies like iA to establish its home base. We're excited iA has chosen to grow in Indiana and create hundreds of high-wage jobs for Hoosiers." -Governor Holcomb

To stay up to date on the latest developments, make sure you're following Governor Holcomb on Facebook (https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c97eaa2a82&e=bd22884127&mc_cid=97322a0564&mc_eid=UNIQID) , Twitter (https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=5288cdf6c3&e=bd22884127&mc_cid=97322a0564&mc_eid=UNIQID) , and Instagram (https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a64dd61359&e=bd22884127&mc_cid=97322a0564&mc_eid=UNIQID) !

Photo: Governor Holcomb speaks at iA's global HQ announcement

Vaccine News

Last weekend, more than 16,000 Hoosiers received their COVID-19 shot at the Indianapolis Motor Speedway during a four-day mass vaccination effort! Every time a Hoosier gets vaccinated, we get one step closer to defeating the virus. Vaccinations are eligible for Hoosiers aged 50 and over. Register for a vaccine by visiting ourshot.in.gov (http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=f0de5e55195b475e87a05e683e823b00&_e=QxcVWklJdsZ2oREHxYuWQRmeSNN-s1lRKq6zjQLB-yXZrskGsqMyjYOSELJk-AYFefnKm3Zx34fsVZwodaYfXvJvxO4eH9IvtLilfuSJeZjk6tMsQ9oj-BAf_sWbBEVC7f0G5RccxmDf6kuevCkMdnB13_FCcMseVPSSpm4bjEHCZFV3kgrL3FnIfNJQ-UDwKj_wmVMiL0b0PAJUSA84pDbqRYdxS05UR8YSCaa5Kbf9ASm3Gq2CIe0Dkit3YK9hWcQEPnZQdj01-xOIb9-HFGVhZ3D7q2BdjI4tFbI6ORIvvPLiIRlZyl4oz-5bvB5gWvxWlDE5PJrD9sbqXQ6eulhBqyMtKOFgQ1lhMwoKuoHK9pmiviLi-6sS5iJb3xL2HntAfmQIcIHijNw7gt0zCJ3QJcnzIlFBv8_yAgZKx8IxxbraC_meCjtwYfBjgzoXVEQh_l3ePCixDBezGpNhpGigKw_w1evwypqaQKUNBvg%3D&mc_cid=97322a0564&mc_eid=UNIQID) or by calling 2-1-1.

Congratulations County Party Leaders

Congratulations to all of our newly elected county party leaders! Our party is built on success at the local level and engaged grassroots supporters. We're excited and ready to keep Indiana's winning streak going! Let's get to work.

Welcome March Madness

Thanks to our state's COVID-19 response led by Governor Holcomb and the Indiana State Department of Health, one of the nation's top vaccine rollouts and a plan to safely host games with fans in attendance, Indiana has the privilege of hosting ALL of the 2021 NCAA Division I Men's Basketball Tournament! While the stands might not be full, these games will provide a much needed boost to Hoosier businesses and help revitalize downtown Indianapolis.

"Basketball is part of Indiana’s DNA, our core identity and our globally identifiable trait. So it’s perfectly fitting that all of March Madness will happen on Hoosier hard courts and inside our great cathedrals to the game." -Governor Holcomb

News You Can Use

Peter \--

Today, we are excited to release our newest ad in support of the Biden Administration's huge success of signing the American Relief Plan.

Julianna

Senate Republicans are wondering, do you support the radical Left's wish list? In case you've forgotten, here's a reminder of what's at the top of their list... We must work together to support Senate Republicans in their fight to push back on all of these dangerous policies! However, they need your valued input.

In case you've forgotten, here's a reminder of what's at the top of their list...
* Enacting job-killing policies
* Opening our borders
* Destroying the Second Amendment
* Packing the Supreme Court

Is this what you want to see prioritized? With Chuck Schumer in control of the Senate, this is what we have to look forward to.

name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: I still like Dr. Seuss...do you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
That's right. The next victim of cancel culture is the quintessential American author, Dr. Seuss.

Friend, it's Kevin McCarthy and I need to tell you something.

Some will tell me to keep it quiet. Some will tell me it's wrong. Some will even try to shame me -- cancel me, even. But I'm proud to say:

**I still like Dr. Seuss.**

_In fact, I just read "Green Eggs and Ham."_

But thanks to Biden and the Radical Left, future generations of Americans will be cheated out of the chance to read his timeless stories. [**I need your help to save Dr. Seuss from cancel culture and put an end to the Left 's censorship. Will you chip in to END cancel culture? AND when you do, I'll send you your very own copy of Dr. Seuss' classic _Cat in the Hat!_**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001aV7m-W5ijP9wP8nMrio9VKjFEURN7Sv-AKhrXzhygUL5wjPMoPSf4BepPikRyMfvvoyzzIaXsQc8EX8rbSVpvpGXsX3HfWFp2Xw6P2Ex_VKYtmCqOGcuj6_NFKBZUmw432C36otieAD9PobcSro7D2DCQPxRWlk-Y-FybNcdYISi2ZEN-jiTC_w_N3UO_Bd0P4-Oz5DUaSFxEcgL2kNxMbE6MY_Kc-qHlzBNm8HU0fiLmoxpOmkDJhg1_D2lrFufnzeWht3ri08SU-5sIulBPLSukyQkEUwNKtd0p0Hb8GLDzfsltJYhSXJfrr2Efd05rWE0d-1wUrhv7nYBQgD0ESz2_wYnbeIog_3jpMKITF1ItvdaWzS26-goKGZtjrTJA8snjKVNzoHJV4su4WNtgaEYhTLlAVBknwc5qYILsGA=&c=zqh1y1EvMQRAGru9ZwAIJ0sOcLBMjT2wqMOHVnoZ43WCfVYmDGB0iA==&ch=HidKAF1Z31SDlaX3wqn0TCad-OEgjzuMA0TfvgIVYNrhCcIDQmVlZA==)

That's right. The next victim of cancel culture is the quintessential American author, Dr. Seuss. He spent his life dedicated to creating timeless stories for generations of American children. We can't let the Democrats ruin our kids' childhoods, but we need your help to stop them.

If you agree with us that the Democrats have gone TOO FAR in censoring FREE SPEECH, [**I hope you 'll join our fight by chipping in for your OWN copy of _Cat in the Hat._**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001aV7m-W5ijP9wP8nMrio9VKjFEURN7Sv-AKhrXzhygUL5wjPMoPSf4BepPikRyMfvvoyzzIaXsQc8EX8rbSVpvpGXsX3HfWFp2Xw6P2Ex_VKYtmCqOGcuj6_NFKBZUmw432C36otieAD9PobcSro7D2DCQPxRWlk-Y-FybNcdYISi2ZEN-jiTC_w_N3UO_Bd0P4-Oz5DUaSFxEcgL2kNxMbE6MY_Kc-qHlzBNm8HU0fiLmoxpOmkDJhg1_D2lrFufnzeWht3ri08SU-5sIulBPLSukyQkEUwNKtd0p0Hb8GLDzfsltJYhSXJfrr2Efd05rWE0d-1wUrhv7nYBQgD0ESz2_wYnbeIog_3jpMKITF1ItvdaWzS26-goKGZtjrTJA8snjKVNzoHJV4su4WNtgaEYhTLlAVBknwc5qYILsGA=&c=zqh1y1EvMQRAGru9ZwAIJ0sOcLBMjT2wqMOHVnoZ43WCfVYmDGB0iA==&ch=HidKAF1Z31SDlaX3wqn0TCad-OEgjzuMA0TfvgIVYNrhCcIDQmVlZA==)

Thank you,

Kevin McCarthy

House Republican Leader

name: =?utf-8?Q?Amanda=20Makki?=
subject: See my interview with MSNBC on the latest COVID legislation
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://us2.campaign-archive.com/?e=c2296cffff&u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=54cdf00f8a)
---
| |
---
| | Dear Fellow Patriot,

I hope you are doing well and staying safe!

President Biden signed his first major legislative initiative yesterday - _a $1.9 trillion partisan bill_ that contains _less than 10 p_ _ercent_ in actual COVID relief. Republicans are rightly calling out the left for the “**Pelosi Payoff'** as well as a Democrat wish-list of items contained in this legislation that didn’t see a single hearing in either the House or the Senate, or negotiations with a single Republican before its passage.
**In my interview below on MSNBC, I provide the conservative viewpoint on the COVID ‘relief” bill and discuss the blue state bailouts. As you will see, they cut me short of fully discussing the topic.

Here are my thoughts on this massive spending bill:**

**-$350B to bail** out states and local governments whose Democrat leaders failed them.
For example, San Francisco currently faces a **$650M budget shortfall, and your tax dollars will help plug the gap to the tune of $600M**, virtually making their problem disappear!

-**$168B for schools**, yet there isn't a single requirement that schools re-open or that teachers show up to work. _In fact, we know Democrats aren’t prioritizing school openings this year because only $6.1B is allocated for FY 2021._

-**$1.5B for Amtrak

-$470M for Arts&Humanities/libraries and museums

****All this spending comes on the heels of the $4 trillion we’ve already provided in the previous five COVID relief bills, much of which has yet to be doled out. _As a reminder, all five COVID relief bills passed by President Trump were accomplished with bipartisan support. _**

_Another stimulus bill is in the works, under the guise of infrastructure._ As infrastructure has always been a bipartisan issue (much like COVID should have been) it will contain funding for infrastructure, but it could also include personal and corporate tax increases as well as Green New Deal priorities, such as a carbon tax that will cost you more money at the pump and is certain to crush more domestic energy jobs. And similar to the COVID bill, it will likely pass through reconciliation (meaning they only need 51 votes). Look for this bill after the end of the fiscal year, 9/30/2021 since Congress is limited to only two reconciliation bills each calendar year.
---
| [ ](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=7c8d5018bf&e=c2296cffff)
---
MSNBC - March 6, 2021
| I believe Republicans see an opportunity to take back Congress in 2022 with all the wasteful spending Democrats continue to pursue, their deep partisanship, and their failure to go up against the teachers' unions.

As always, I would love to hear your thoughts on where the party goes from here. Please feel free to email me or keep in touch via social media!

**Facebook: Amanda Makki for Congress
Instagram: amandamakki
Twitter: @amandamakki**

Gratefully yours,
Amanda Makki
---

name: Josh Hawley
subject: FWD: Trump was right about the border
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate
body:
I wanted to follow up on my earlier email. Peter,
I wanted to follow up on my earlier email.

On Tuesday, I wrote a letter to both President Biden and the Chairman of the Senate Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs Committee demanding DHS Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas testify on the **ONGOING AND ESCALATING CRISIS** at our southern border.

I am fighting to hold the Biden Administration accountable for their **DANGEROUS INACTION AT OUR SOUTHERN BORDER**.

The crisis on the border shows no signs of letting up, and neither does the crisis of leadership coming from the White House.

—Josh
\-------Forwarded message-------
From: Josh Hawley
Date: March 11th, 2021
Subject: Trump was right about the border
Peter,
Our southern border is approaching a full-blown crisis, and the Biden Admin’s response is... **NOTHING.**

This crisis was created by Joe Biden’s reckless and dangerous immigration policies.

On **DAY ONE** , Joe Biden signed an Executive Order opening our southern border, “Proclamation on the Termination Of Emergency With Respect To The Southern Border Of The United States...”

In February, he used another Executive Order to “Develop a Strategy to Address Irregular Migration Across the Southern Border...”

There is a **HUMANITARIAN CRISIS** on our southern border fueled by Joe Biden’s policies and rhetoric.

Donald Trump is right when he says, “Our country is being destroyed at the southern border...”

The media may try to continue to ignore this **FULL BLOWN CRISIS** , but I won’t be silent. Biden’s policies aren't empathetic, they're reckless, and our national security is at stake.

**I won't let Joe Biden get away with ignoring the CRISIS HE CREATED!**

Join with me, and donate — **Every dollar helps fight against the dangerous policies coming from the White House.**

| | Friends-

So far, more than 20,000 have signed our petition calling on Andrew Cuomo to resign.

I was the first to call for a federal investigation into the his deadly order that led to the death of more than 15,000 seniors in our nursing homes.

Since then, I’ve been front and center calling for Cuomo’s resignation on television, radio and in the newspaper.

Today, Cuomo held a fake press conference at which he refused to resign. Now, seven women who have accused him of serious sexual harassment and assault.

At his press conference, Cuomo said, "there is a difference between opinions and facts."

---

| | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.lt.acemlnc.com/Prod/link-tracker?&a=25864240&account=nicolemalliotakis%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=460A647A1A8999)

* 7 women have accused him of serious sexual harassment and assault.

* 15,000 seniors died because of Cuomo’s nursing home order.

* 4 different agencies are investigating Cuomo’s potentially criminal conduct: U.S. Department of Justice, NYS Attorney General, Albany Police Department and the NYS Assembly’s Judiciary Committee.

My opinion: His behavior is disgusting.

The Facts: Over 80% of New York's Congressional Delegation and nearly 60% of New York's state lawmakers have joined with me and called for his resignation.

**The liberals in charge are more interested in furthering their own radical agenda than in doing any real good for our country.** In just the last few weeks, Joe Biden and his cronies have caused more damage than we thought possible. They cost our country THOUSANDS of jobs when they canceled the Keystone XL Pipeline, REFUSED to let our kids back to school safely, and spent OVER A TRILLION DOLLARS on a so-called COVID-19 relief bill that does nothing to actually help Americans.

Friend,

**Did you know the radical Left is still trying to steal the IA-02 election? **

_After Rita Hart challenged this race last fall, ballots were counted and recounted, AND Iowa 's election officials certified the results this past December,_ **the Left STILL cannot accept the fact that Iowans elected Mariannette Miller-Meeks to represent the people of Iowa 's 2nd District. **

**Let me repeat it, once again: Mariannette Miller-Meeks is the WINNER of Iowa 's 2nd District.**

Mariannette's election was certified by a bipartisan panel of Iowans, **yet Nancy Pelosi and Washington politicians are STILL trying to overturn this election and reject Iowans ' voices. **

We simply cannot stand for this, Friend.

**And Americans across the country should not stand for this either! **

**Join me in standing _with_ Mariannette Miller-Meeks and telling Nancy Pelosi and _the radical Left: the outcome of Iowa's elections should be -- and has been -- decided by Iowans._**
[**CHIP IN NOW TO STAND FOR ELECTION INTEGRITY**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015RW6HqskQySV1rJe_PX3_JziUjDsfttAz49wpyHifHFfoXbnnJv0m0YVLdM6x80O3tUi8jb6QJYTS6NnZqe7_8jm0YSeEVwMaZBntRenftG29TJC9D_ZYqbf7fxvEP42XoWeNvsoPBGgLSrUiejT7eNL1SyDetuUHIV8pjSIm4XetpMG_YgMmEG_CNtpkvTOVhq_t0Lob4X2ritm9rCC1AcAyg6jMT2NtI92Atnc8upuCq_yL8-Whz1hdFaVlAOh_hO9LwJkX_L4txDZYCInbQqrBBf8qeSCo3SL4nu0WIOhOqqO_ptI_z4h2_eXxYISO-6QpLsG0mC9dggAnkTe5mjH0thGpqytlCzrZdkWyKlEcTrluOW3FYUFirx9O0R0TsU1vpyO6fuHuERK6xfVtQxYxcKKAVTQRmkJKUvZVbYj0OMbWATYrFlkx7kSnUZ0-wHEk12KMp4=&c=UShbxV_wijp1MNOgtUCSY630yzbM2PNz9I9MOt67FBo4v1W3zp-QGg==&ch=N2kq55K9Dr1yHLcpnZkRPZqTOnC-UIX6HwIvM9lAetCmEvX_gLwRkA==)

name: Congressman Bob Latta
subject: Hello, it’s Congressman Latta
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY LATTA FOR CONGRESS
body:
While you may not have heard of me, I think my interests and work in Washington may align more to your goals for Conservatives in Congress than you know.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hKQF-CdTeUN4YgXjEbTrGGSkCJxjWB-6rDjmnMlQ-PPyeP5vi59UzjXOo4EzF2Q_7Ph5juyZqHWAcp8oSEHfo96bGHe3-DTUvkGqiYnIHVRifNjKeQoMpY0cOWk2hmj4e-38jZ0aSNLDE0uOJOtbJp3HvpcfkoLDEPIKsi8yhAeq4pXtN96hWXQCK2Eic7k27GX-ZoSxqNKwoSeyscjFCEAIcx1pLPHfHeoSBaii5Hgu9o_99Za85X_5aNvvaFoSze9pkaxWkVe-W4e8LCebpY7LLeXz7nnq1juzyFvISwptqe4Nq7xS0xngxse1NuqEvuIKnfdr-F9RTvCTUgD_GNEzKujdiDL3BlVP8gAQDq0znvtrIyIvUu6JfxYdps9NnD_uM0tYRnG1ff600-P-hcjC_knJh8z7VTBWC8bnTjFYPBO9pzdwPA==&c=Vl0k-Gi_V-_W08BhRDke9zalG-TFdIuSh0HLsNvqDrVMA4skqu4Fkw==&ch=kSxZ47YYiffPgEDibHaP_ajFpStVI3-qnNzvGRSGkqm22B_yZP-cQA==)

Hi, Friend, I'm Bob Latta, and I have been the proud Congressman of Ohio's 5th district since 2007.

While you may not have heard of me, I think my interests and work in Washington may align more to your goals for Conservatives in Congress than you know. I believe that America can work for everyone with policies that further economic prosperity and job creation. My priorities in Washington include balancing the budget, giving back to our veterans, protecting the 2nd Amendment, and keeping the government off the backs of our small businesses.

I'm a lifelong resident of Ohio, and I couldn't be happier to not only grow up there but to start a family and raise my children in the same place too. I have earned the support of my fellow Ohioans over the years because they know they can count on me to always back conservative values. Like my constituents in Northwest Ohio, I can be counted on to show up and work hard.

I've led on dozens of bills that have helped Americans, ranging from combating the Opioid Crisis to passing energy legislation that ensures the heat stays on in the winter. Advocating for conservative policies that support free enterprise and remove unwanted overreach of government is a cornerstone of my time in Congress, and I am still continuing my commitment to prevent the Democrats from inserting their burdensome policies into every facet of American society.

I've also been on the frontlines in Congress in protecting our 1st amendment rights, and ensuring the Democrats can't silence conservative speech. If Americans aren't able to speak up and speak out, then our way of life will be changed forever.

I'm proud to keep myself and my colleagues unified against the hypocrisy of the Democrats and their support for restrictions that undermine our American prosperity. For instance, My colleagues and I continue to speak out against the Biden administration's canceling of the Keystone pipeline, which puts Americans out of work & undermines American energy security.

I'm reaching out to you now because I fear this Democrat-run government and the burdensome change they are trying to force on us. Fighting back against the policies that hurt our Americans and small business is something I am very eager to do, **but I can 't do it without your support.** [**My team and I continue to fight back against the ultra-progressive Democratic Caucus that is trying to destroy our free-market economy. Will you join our effort?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hKQF-CdTeUN4YgXjEbTrGGSkCJxjWB-6rDjmnMlQ-PPyeP5vi59UzjXOo4EzF2Q_7Ph5juyZqHWAcp8oSEHfo96bGHe3-DTUvkGqiYnIHVRifNjKeQoMpY0cOWk2hmj4e-38jZ0aSNLDE0uOJOtbJp3HvpcfkoLDEPIKsi8yhAeq4pXtN96hWXQCK2Eic7k27GX-ZoSxqNKwoSeyscjFCEAIcx1pLPHfHeoSBaii5Hgu9o_99Za85X_5aNvvaFoSze9pkaxWkVe-W4e8LCebpY7LLeXz7nnq1juzyFvISwptqe4Nq7xS0xngxse1NuqEvuIKnfdr-F9RTvCTUgD_GNEzKujdiDL3BlVP8gAQDq0znvtrIyIvUu6JfxYdps9NnD_uM0tYRnG1ff600-P-hcjC_knJh8z7VTBWC8bnTjFYPBO9pzdwPA==&c=Vl0k-Gi_V-_W08BhRDke9zalG-TFdIuSh0HLsNvqDrVMA4skqu4Fkw==&ch=kSxZ47YYiffPgEDibHaP_ajFpStVI3-qnNzvGRSGkqm22B_yZP-cQA==)

I know that I am asking a lot of you, but there are serious consequences to the Democrats' policies that someone like yourself knows all too well. That is why your support is critically important and it will keep my team and I working against the Radical Left's agenda.

If you're able to donate, thank you. Your donation is very much appreciated and will go straight toward pushing back against this radical agenda the Democrats are trying to force on us through their power in Congress.

If you can't donate right now, that is okay and I understand your hesitation, but I'm simply asking that you visit my website [**here****->****https://lattaforcongress.com.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hKQF-CdTeUN4YgXjEbTrGGSkCJxjWB-6rDjmnMlQ-PPyeP5vi59UzjXOo4EzF2Q_6Top_Rf9Cv3fIl2q_XZKhR_TVfgZ-pnOW460-e57UEozlBeoj8lXP71suGO0s7-rSP-ZYcn1_lNKKcUsjWq4rXlOMct4m3vD&c=Vl0k-Gi_V-_W08BhRDke9zalG-TFdIuSh0HLsNvqDrVMA4skqu4Fkw==&ch=kSxZ47YYiffPgEDibHaP_ajFpStVI3-qnNzvGRSGkqm22B_yZP-cQA==) There you will be able to learn all about my background, my success in working hard for Americans, and what issues I stand for.

I'm honored to have been elected to serve the people of Ohio and all Americans for another 2 years. I appreciate your taking the time to read this and I hope I can count on your support!

Sincerely,

Rep. Bob Latta

PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY LATTA FOR CONGRESS

-PO Box 106
Bowling Green, OH 43402

name: True the Vote
subject: True the Vote Weekly Update | 3.12.21
body:
A weekly wrap-up of all things election integrity.
| | | | |
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| |
* * *
STATE FOCUS: GEORGIA

Across our country, election reform bills are being lobbied, drafted, and passed by legislatures. It is no secret that there has been an enormous amount of outrage and backlash by those in opposition. However, it is important to actually take the time and thoroughly read through the provisions being suggested as the truth within these bills are not being echoed by mainstream media. These bills aim to verify, protect, and secure one of our most sacred rights as Americans, the right to vote. Georgia’s [House](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZsZWdpc2Nhbi5jb20lMkZHQSUyRnRleHQlMkZIQjUzMSUyRjIwMjE=&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=374A870A20A4074) and [Senate](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZsZWdpc2Nhbi5jb20lMkZHQSUyRnRleHQlMkZTQjI0MSUyRjIwMjE=&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=374A870A20A4075) omnibus bills are prominent examples of election reform bills that to protect and secure, not suppress, your vote.

[Read the rest](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkZnZW9yZ2lhLWVsZWN0aW9uLW9tbmlidXMtYmlsbHMtbGVhZC10aGUtd2F5LWluLWVsZWN0aW9uLXJlZm9ybSUyRg==&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=374A870A20A4088).

---
| | Take Action

Does your local or state party have an election integrity task force? Find out whether your local or state party has a task force focused on securing the integrity of the next election. Our state by state database has all the information you need to find out who to contact in your town, precinct, county, or state. And once you're in touch, get involved in the process. You can help out, volunteer, or even just offer your support for their effort, to keep them on the right track.

Click on your state using our interactive map to find out what's happening where you vote!

---
| | [](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkZyZXNvdXJjZXMlMkYlMjNtYXA=&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=374A870A20A4080)
---
| | MUST READS

Stacey Abrams Pressures Corporate America to Oppose Voter Integrity Laws From Breitbart \- Stacey Abrams, a far-left activist desperate to enshrine cheat-by-mail into law, is pressuring Big Business to speak out against a number of voter integrity laws making their way through the Georgia legislature.
[Read the rest](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ3d3cuYnJlaXRiYXJ0LmNvbSUyRnBvbGl0aWNzJTJGMjAyMSUyRjAzJTJGMTElMkZub2x0ZS1zdGFjZXktYWJyYW1zLXByZXNzdXJpbmctY29ycG9yYXRlLWFtZXJpY2EtdG8tb3Bwb3NlLXZvdGVyLWludGVncml0eS1sYXdzJTJG&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=374A870A20A4064).

China approves plan to tighten control of Hong Kong elections so that only ‘patriots’ run the city
From ABC News \- China’s parliament has endorsed electoral reforms that pave the way for Hong Kong's biggest shake-up since the former British colony was handed back to Chinese rule in 1997.
[Read the rest](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZhYmNuZXdzLmdvLmNvbSUyRkludGVybmF0aW9uYWwlMkZjaGluYS1hcHByb3Zlcy1wbGFuLXRpZ2h0ZW4tY29udHJvbC1ob25nLWtvbmctZWxlY3Rpb25zJTJGc3RvcnklM0ZpZCUzRDc2Mzg1NjI0&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=374A870A20A4065).

Exclusive– Conservative Documentarian: Elections Are Not Won and Lost in the Days During an Election, but in Between Election
>From Breitbart \- “Elections are not won and lost in the days during an election; it’s between the elections,” advised Amanda Milius, director of [The Plot Against The President](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZwYXRwbW92aWUuY29tJTJG&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=374A870A20A4085), a documentary film based on Lee Smith’s book of the same name on Thursday’s edition of SiriusXM’s Breitbart News Daily with host Alex Marlow.
[Read the rest](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ3d3cuYnJlaXRiYXJ0LmNvbSUyRnJhZGlvJTJGMjAyMSUyRjAyJTJGMjUlMkZleGNsdXNpdmUtY29uc2VydmF0aXZlLWRvY3VtZW50YXJpYW4tZWxlY3Rpb25zLW5vdC13b24tbG9zdC1kdXJpbmctZWxlY3Rpb24lMkY=&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=374A870A20A4086).
---
| | [ I SUPPORT ELECTION INTEGRITY ](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVlLXRoZS12b3RlLnJldnYuY28lMkZwZ19ob21lXzYyNDIw&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=374A870A20A4056)
---
| |
* * *

Latest Legislation

PA SB404 - Election law
Pennsylvania Senate Bill 404 is one of over 30 proposition for making changes to the Pennsylvania Election Code introduced this year by establishing a "Statement of Voter’s Rights" in the state. Sponsored by Democrat Lisa M. Boscola.
Status: Referred to state gov't.
[Link to Bill](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ3d3cubGVnaXMuc3RhdGUucGEudXMlMkZjZmRvY3MlMkZiaWxsSW5mbyUyRmJpbGxJbmZvLmNmbSUzRnNZZWFyJTNEMjAyMSUyNnNJbmQlM0QwJTI2Ym9keSUzRFMlMjZ0eXBlJTNEQiUyNmJuJTNEMDQwNA==&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=374A870A20A4082)

TX SB 1535 - Early voting by mail; Poll watchers
Authored by Republican Dawn Buckingham, Senate Bill 1535 would increase penalties for criminally interfering with the electoral process, and would raise the standards to meet in order to be an appointed watcher during ballot counting or recounting.
Status: Filed.
[Link to Bill](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZjYXBpdG9sLnRleGFzLmdvdiUyRkJpbGxMb29rdXAlMkZIaXN0b3J5LmFzcHglM0ZMZWdTZXNzJTNEODdSJTI2QmlsbCUzRFNCMTUzNQ==&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=374A870A20A4083)

NJ SB3509 - In-person voting
"No municipal, county, or State election or other official shall institute any policies or procedures to circumvent the requirement to provide for voting in person," reads Senate Bill 3509 in part. Sponsored by Republican Samuel D. Thompson, the bill proposes to prevent any state official, from municipality to legislature to the governor, from interfering with or abrogating the ability and opportunity of any citizen to vote in person at a polling place. Meaning not even when there's a pandemic.
Status: In committee.
[Link to Bill](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ3d3cubmpsZWcuc3RhdGUubmoudXMlMkYyMDIwJTJGQmlsbHMlMkZTNDAwMCUyRjM1MDlfSTEuSFRN&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=374A870A20A4084)

name: GOP Alerts via NVAF
subject: Pelosi playing partisan games
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Victory Action Fund
body:
Nancy Pelosi gave us a preview of the ultra liberal agenda she and her far left allies intend to enact now that they control the White House and both chambers of Congress.

body:
Biden has managed to put AMERICA LAST in just two short months.

Friend,

America LAST.

Biden has managed to do that in just two short months. Despite inheriting the most secure southern border he now has his own self-created border crisis. He dismantled the Keystone Pipeline and along with it all the good jobs that resulted from it.
****[DEFEND THE AMERICA FIRST AGENDA](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Wuu7q9wOrEiH-1Vz2Z0xJLx-nISQdip1x1TdKt7Dbzvi2dELzmu7SsvTPg2bSrwv2ry_5tAxyeWQNv3ESuOK_4s_KHCrZBdwSSVk5JrOIKJG8NxJiZCr_STF3OS_OYxfnle-wT3bZEdxZYrEFukWIKESftdCaI7onKbGC1Ncfk0Kr8HTXHih3fYQdYY-DGebp7Sd4FcLAJNnSFyIkT2RRa9lE7EmBKq0plQBXc5iLKZKP1yKqOlm1XCb9Vg3owvQijygrvPAvQYGoN02ts8qi9Rc6GFNGJyRkM4NZi1_laHQrahPOR35-7uB_nnd1q3vpSI6dTmvjk4Lt1Ssc4TN5Az0RCZyP65o_sYpg9u4vh1lLiFOXji4Vmpp9smYjCZLtEb5MALAM6dmyo_R8ZZ1DK9w8_6khg4wbjOtlLmSLcQ=&c=Iu_Yw_4BzTKioKuKobO8mNsgrtXqr1waPY-jwpzdEjC7UQg5cfcBVw==&ch=wjKE6lsR6K4VGBSWToDaahOdaCbMw2aUsrYH2gFLokHxTmWeHkLJeg==)****

**[**DEFEND THE AMERICA FIRST AGENDA**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Wuu7q9wOrEiH-1Vz2Z0xJLx-nISQdip1x1TdKt7Dbzvi2dELzmu7SsvTPg2bSrwv2ry_5tAxyeWQNv3ESuOK_4s_KHCrZBdwSSVk5JrOIKJG8NxJiZCr_STF3OS_OYxfnle-wT3bZEdxZYrEFukWIKESftdCaI7onKbGC1Ncfk0Kr8HTXHih3fYQdYY-DGebp7Sd4FcLAJNnSFyIkT2RRa9lE7EmBKq0plQBXc5iLKZKP1yKqOlm1XCb9Vg3owvQijygrvPAvQYGoN02ts8qi9Rc6GFNGJyRkM4NZi1_laHQrahPOR35-7uB_nnd1q3vpSI6dTmvjk4Lt1Ssc4TN5Az0RCZyP65o_sYpg9u4vh1lLiFOXji4Vmpp9smYjCZLtEb5MALAM6dmyo_R8ZZ1DK9w8_6khg4wbjOtlLmSLcQ=&c=Iu_Yw_4BzTKioKuKobO8mNsgrtXqr1waPY-jwpzdEjC7UQg5cfcBVw==&ch=wjKE6lsR6K4VGBSWToDaahOdaCbMw2aUsrYH2gFLokHxTmWeHkLJeg==)**

We need to take back the Senate and make it clear that we won't stand for an America Last philosophy. [**Please help us stop Biden 's destruction of President Trump's America First Agenda.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Wuu7q9wOrEiH-1Vz2Z0xJLx-nISQdip1x1TdKt7Dbzvi2dELzmu7SsvTPg2bSrwv2ry_5tAxyeWQNv3ESuOK_4s_KHCrZBdwSSVk5JrOIKJG8NxJiZCr_STF3OS_OYxfnle-wT3bZEdxZYrEFukWIKESftdCaI7onKbGC1Ncfk0Kr8HTXHih3fYQdYY-DGebp7Sd4FcLAJNnSFyIkT2RRa9lE7EmBKq0plQBXc5iLKZKP1yKqOlm1XCb9Vg3owvQijygrvPAvQYGoN02ts8qi9Rc6GFNGJyRkM4NZi1_laHQrahPOR35-7uB_nnd1q3vpSI6dTmvjk4Lt1Ssc4TN5Az0RCZyP65o_sYpg9u4vh1lLiFOXji4Vmpp9smYjCZLtEb5MALAM6dmyo_R8ZZ1DK9w8_6khg4wbjOtlLmSLcQ=&c=Iu_Yw_4BzTKioKuKobO8mNsgrtXqr1waPY-jwpzdEjC7UQg5cfcBVw==&ch=wjKE6lsR6K4VGBSWToDaahOdaCbMw2aUsrYH2gFLokHxTmWeHkLJeg==)

body:
I'll take on the Radical Left.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WFSe5zyUi_pwaRrt3lkvH8ClsOj-umy3xLVuY-6TF7jhywsJxAcW0gRuHsWW4x10oTc034DNgqx_mzYxWEJ4gCqj7AbXdo3qgFnzn951cWsBKuN2RDHjo6lqHeJNjeoQqyFdhfkiydjAvJOymq4OaKXTpaLp7kPQ3CbIaGvGfbJZ0VaxtWQ0NlA8p1_Jk3xjmyd3z0IEqmHqbLj9B2Ds1cEnnVurWSrpwExpqw947Kck--r0e_upMXmuouuFOWYwTTS6y4yrfJv1nnriYHy9_z5NVsrAKkiYR97myg3CJJpZYVAm4hAMi1o_7n-tmqIzObTsShje7idKikb15Wyfg7o6U4S1pKEShx87c3YnRC08NZ-SJPevBVRSYenttP0iwddkM5QzEPJJt2mdyndVncGkmnr7GPgTPA47FvpSN9IPBljQI5vAO0om8eoa7b2dHBK21dk3ozE=&c=uxdO8vBKJPaOaRNc5b1mRp2MfGuyRXZSOu_UqJVy_eMfq56hFRW0MA==&ch=iHrLUkguod3q0qxkn_yyxJXR8wa1WoGelRq9YzFbavCCt52Pbkp0Ag==)
Friend,
This is Jake Ellzey. I'm a retired Navy fighter pilot, a TOUGH Conservative, and I'm running for Congress in Texas' 6th Congressional District.
I have a proven track record serving my country in the military for over 20 years, even earning two Bronze Stars and eight Air Medals.
That's why after all of my sacrifices, it makes me sick to see Nancy Pelosi, AOC, and other liberal Democrats in Washington D.C. take advantage of hard-working Americans who I swore to defend.
**To be honest with you, Friend, I 'm running for Congress because someone needs to stand up to the Radical Left. **
This is a HUGE moment in our country's history. Far-left Democrats have just decided to do whatever it takes to force their extreme, Socialist agenda on the rest of the country.
**We need STRONG leadership in Congress that 's not afraid to stand up and tell the Radical Left what's right and what's wrong. **
I'm committed to being that strong leader who never backs down -- but I need your help.
[**Will you chip in NOW and help me get to Congress to STOP the Radical Left?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WFSe5zyUi_pwaRrt3lkvH8ClsOj-umy3xLVuY-6TF7jhywsJxAcW0gRuHsWW4x10oTc034DNgqx_mzYxWEJ4gCqj7AbXdo3qgFnzn951cWsBKuN2RDHjo6lqHeJNjeoQqyFdhfkiydjAvJOymq4OaKXTpaLp7kPQ3CbIaGvGfbJZ0VaxtWQ0NlA8p1_Jk3xjmyd3z0IEqmHqbLj9B2Ds1cEnnVurWSrpwExpqw947Kck--r0e_upMXmuouuFOWYwTTS6y4yrfJv1nnriYHy9_z5NVsrAKkiYR97myg3CJJpZYVAm4hAMi1o_7n-tmqIzObTsShje7idKikb15Wyfg7o6U4S1pKEShx87c3YnRC08NZ-SJPevBVRSYenttP0iwddkM5QzEPJJt2mdyndVncGkmnr7GPgTPA47FvpSN9IPBljQI5vAO0om8eoa7b2dHBK21dk3ozE=&c=uxdO8vBKJPaOaRNc5b1mRp2MfGuyRXZSOu_UqJVy_eMfq56hFRW0MA==&ch=iHrLUkguod3q0qxkn_yyxJXR8wa1WoGelRq9YzFbavCCt52Pbkp0Ag==)

**It's Not "Insurrectionists" Destroying Our Norms. It's The New Authoritarian Left**

_Democrats’ idyllic version of freedom is actually hedonism – the natural result of what happens when an entire movement becomes radically secularized._

By Bobby Jindal and Alex Castellanos
|
---
When fascism comes to America, it will not be at the point of a gun.

It won’t be installed by CPAC’s favorite 2024 candidate, ridiculous QAnon conspirators, or the destitute MAGA supporters who trashed the U.S. Capitol on January 6. When authoritarianism comes, it will not accompany white supremacists, conspiracy theorists with horned and furry hats, or a frustrated working-class that has seen its dreams evaporate with its jobs.

New authoritarianism will come not through armed insurrection, but as a cure, in a bottle of candy-flavored medicine. It is the noble motive that drugs us, puts us to sleep, while government power over our lives grows. It sneaks in behind a great social purpose. It will be prescribed by the left as they promise to protect us from every evil, real and imagined.

...

subject: Help is Here! American Relief Plan Update
body:
| | | |
---
| | | Dear Friends

Just 50 days since taking office, President Biden and Democrats have secured a major and consequential victory: successfully passing the American Rescue Plan (ARP), a bold and historic legislative package that will provide much-needed relief to millions of working people across the country. Today the DNC is [launching](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=4b0615738c&e=d6c5c7d7ec) a new push to tout the American Rescue Plan to voters, including a new 60-second television ad, “[Help Is Here](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=b06f175a91&e=d6c5c7d7ec),” that highlights how President Biden and Democrats have delivered real, tangible results for the American people and their families by making the American Rescue Plan a reality.

House and Senate Republicans turned their back on the American people and played games with the relief package families need — and not a single one voted for the bill. This relief package is supported by a bipartisan majority of the public.

A [CBS News-YouGov poll](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=1f1d8849c5&e=d6c5c7d7ec) found that 75% of voters approve of Congress passing this COVID relief bill, including 77% of independents.

A [Politico/Morning Consult poll](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=c18f81ebb6&e=d6c5c7d7ec) found that 75% of voters support the American Rescue Plan, including 71% of independents and 59% of Republican voters. Without you, these victories aren’t possible. To win elections in 2021, 2022 and beyond, we need trusted voices like yours to spread the word now about this incredible victory and what it means for people across the country. This is our time to help our friends and neighbors understand how the ARP benefits them, and what Democrats are able to deliver with their support. Thank you, Mansoor Khadir Senior Advisor - DNC Political & Organizing Department Twitter: @MansoorKhadir
---
|
---
| In this Update
* Details of the Legislation
* Graphics for Social Media
* State-by-State Fact Sheets
* Calendar of Upcoming Events

---
|
---
|
---
| _**DETAILS OF THE LEGISLATION**_
* **DIRECT PAYMENTS TO 85% OF HOUSEHOLDS:** ARP will send checks of up to $1400 per person to 85% of American households – the single largest direct payment to date. A low- or middle-income family of four will get $5,600 in direct checks.

* **INVESTMENT IN VACCINE DISTRIBUTION:** ARP will allocate $20 billion for vaccine distribution, including $1 billion for the CDC to launch a vaccine awareness and engagement campaign and $7.5 billion to set up vaccination sites across the country.

* **UNEMPLOYMENT EXTENDED THROUGH SEPTEMBER:** ARP extends enhanced unemployment insurance for around 11 million Americans who would otherwise start losing benefits next week – and protects them from surprise tax bills.

* **TENS OF BILLIONS OF DOLLARS FOR RENTERS, HOMEOWNERS:** ARP extends tens of billions of dollars in rental and homeowners assistance that will benefit lower-income, disproportionately Black and Brown, renters and homeowners.

* **$39 BILLION FOR CHILD CARE PROVIDERS:** ARP helps working and middle-class families struggling to juggle child care and work by providing money to reopen schools safely and get vaccines in arms, so kids and teachers can safely return to school and parents can go back to work. This includes the most significant investment in American child care since World War II.

* **66 MILLION KIDS WILL BENEFIT FROM CHILD TAX CREDIT:** ARP lifts 11 million people out of poverty and cuts child poverty in half, including through a historic expansion of the child tax credit that will benefit 66 million kids across our country.

* **EITC EXPANDED TO 17 MILLION WORKERS:** ARP expands the Earned Income Tax Credit to 17 million low-income workers.

* **HEALTH INSURANCE PREMIUMS LOWERED, 100% OF COBRA PREMIUMS COVERED FOR LAID-OFF WORKERS:** Significantly reduces health insurance premiums for millions of American families. A family of four making $90,000 could see their monthly premium come down by $200 per month.

---
|
---

A family of four making $90,000 could see their monthly premium come down by $200 per month. | | GRAPHICS FOR SOCIAL MEDIA See below for graphics and gifs you can upload to your social media accounts. | | | | STATE-BY-STATE FACT SHEETS | | ---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Calendar Of Upcoming Events - President Biden celebrates the signing of the American Rescue Plan with Congressional leaders \- Vice President Harris and Second Gentleman Emhoff will travel to Las Vegas, Nevada to highlight the American Rescue Plan. \- President Biden will travel to Delaware County, Pennsylvania to highlight the American Rescue Plan. \- Vice President Harris and Second Gentleman Emhoff will travel to Denver, Colorado to highlight the American Rescue Plan. \- Second Gentleman Emhoff will travel to Albuquerque, New Mexico to highlight the American Rescue Plan. \- President Biden and Vice President Harris will travel to Atlanta, Georgia to highlight the American Rescue Plan | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com DNC Community Engagement 430 S Capitol Street, SE Washington, DC 20003 * USA

Note from Chairman Stepanek
Derek,

This month we have set the tone in a terrific way, marking the first NHGOP newsletter. The weekly release will highlight upcoming events, legislation, and spotlight Republican leadership within the state. This newsletter is part of a broader operation to expand communication within the State Party and to amplify our message across the Granite State.

To drive this operation, we've added D.J Burke as Finance Director and Maya Harvey as Press Secretary to the NHGOP team. Under the direction of Joe Sweeney, I have the utmost confidence in this team's ability to build off the successes we had in 2020 and propel us forward into the 2022 cycle.

To ensure the success of this campaign, it is crucial to build as much attention to our platforms as possible. Please share our newsletter with friends and family of the NHGOP who aren't currently on our email list, and encourage them to subscribe.

Lastly, if there’s anything you see from the Democrats that you would like us to highlight, please reach out to [info@nhgop.org](mailto:info@nhgop.org)!

Sincerely,
**Stephen Stepanek**
**NHGOP Chairman**

Note from Senate President Morse:
_This week, the New Hampshire Senate voted to complete a journey we began six years ago. With the passage of Senate Bill 13, we voted to lower New Hampshire’s two largest businesses taxes, the Business Profits Tax and Business Enterprise Tax._

Since 2015, Senate Republicans have been fighting to make New Hampshire’s business climate more competitive. With SB13, we will have reduced the BPT from 8.5% to 7.5%, a nearly 12% reduction in the tax rate. Senate Republicans have also lowered the rate of the BET from 0.75% to 0.5%, a 33% rate reduction on the tax on all New Hampshire employers. Reducing these taxes are important because our Main Street businesses are still struggling from the pandemic. This will help small businesses keep our friends and neighbors employed as we work toward restoring New Hampshire’s economy.

SB13 also doubles the current exemption on the Interest & Dividends tax from $1,200 to $2,400 for those who are age 65 or older, blind, disabled or unable to work and not yet 65. Increasing the exemption for those who are 65 and older will make it easier for them to stay in the state and that is important because a third of New Hampshire citizens will be above 65 by 2030.

This bill was a priority for the late Speaker Dick Hinch, and I was honored to take it up as prime sponsor after his passing.

Six years ago, New Hampshire ranked 48th in the nation for business taxes. So Senate Republicans made business tax relief a top priority. We faced stiff partisan opposition. Democrats refused to support any bill that would lower the tax burden on New Hampshire employers

Every year, Democrats said cutting business taxes would hurt our revenues and cause a huge deficit. And every year, thanks to our growing economy, business tax revenues increased and New Hampshire enjoyed a budget surplus

Now is not the time to raise taxes on hard-working men and women and we will continue to prioritize helping our small businesses get back on their feet by reducing their tax and regulatory burdens.

**\- Senate President Chuck Morse**

clean_body: | | secure.nh.gop secure.nh.gop mailto:info@nhgop.org?subject=re:%20Newsletter&body= Note from Chairman Stepanek Derek, This month we have set the tone in a terrific way, marking the first NHGOP newsletter. The weekly release will highlight upcoming events, legislation, and spotlight Republican leadership within the state. This newsletter is part of a broader operation to expand communication within the State Party and to amplify our message across the Granite State. To drive this operation, we've added D.J Burke as Finance Director and Maya Harvey as Press Secretary to the NHGOP team. Under the direction of Joe Sweeney, I have the utmost confidence in this team's ability to build off the successes we had in 2020 and propel us forward into the 2022 cycle. To ensure the success of this campaign, it is crucial to build as much attention to our platforms as possible. Please share our newsletter with friends and family of the NHGOP who aren't currently on our email list, and encourage them to subscribe. Lastly, if there’s anything you see from the Democrats that you would like us to highlight, please reach out to mailto:info@nhgop.org! Sincerely, Stephen Stepanek NHGOP Chairman | | Governor Sununu's Latest Tweets: Note from Senate President Morse: This week, the New Hampshire Senate voted to complete a journey we began six years ago. With the passage of Senate Bill 13, we voted to lower New Hampshire’s two largest businesses taxes, the Business Profits Tax and Business Enterprise Tax. Since 2015, Senate Republicans have been fighting to make New Hampshire’s business climate more competitive. With SB13, we will have reduced the BPT from 8.5% to 7.5%, a nearly 12% reduction in the tax rate. Senate Republicans have also lowered the rate of the BET from 0.75% to 0.5%, a 33% rate reduction on the tax on all New Hampshire employers. Reducing these taxes are important because our Main Street businesses are still struggling from the pandemic. This will help small businesses keep our friends and neighbors employed as we work toward restoring New Hampshire’s economy. SB13 also doubles the current exemption on the Interest & Dividends tax from $1,200 to $2,400 for those who are age 65 or older, blind, disabled or unable to work and not yet 65. Increasing the exemption for those who are 65 and older will make it easier for them to stay in the state and that is important because a third of New Hampshire citizens will be above 65 by 2030. This bill was a priority for the late Speaker Dick Hinch, and I was honored to take it up as prime sponsor after his passing. Six years ago, New Hampshire ranked 48th in the nation for business taxes. So Senate Republicans made business tax relief a top priority. We faced stiff partisan opposition. Democrats refused to support any bill that would lower the tax burden on New Hampshire employers Every year, Democrats said cutting business taxes would hurt our revenues and cause a huge deficit. And every year, thanks to our growing economy, business tax revenues increased and New Hampshire enjoyed a budget surplus Now is not the time to raise taxes on hard-working men and women and we will continue to prioritize helping our small businesses get back on their feet by reducing their tax and regulatory burdens. \- Senate President Chuck Morse | Speaker Packard in the news: Follow our State House Accounts: | Upcoming Events | New Hampshire Happenings with the GOP Merrimack Special Election Update Help the NHGOP and the Committee to Elect House Republicans elect Bill Boyd in our upcoming Special Election! | Interested in getting involved with the New Hampshire Federation of Republican Women? Click the link below NHGOP Tweets: | | | | ---|---|--- | | New Hampshire Republican State Committee 10 Water Street Concord New Hampshire 03301 |
